caption: The video features Prof. M. D. Atrey, who is delivering a lecture on Cryogenic Engineering. He is dressed in a formal suit and is seated in front of a vibrant background that includes a stylized globe with blue and green hues, suggesting a global or scientific theme. The text overlay identifies him as being from the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT Bombay. The lecture appears to be part of an educational series, as indicated by the NPTEL logo in the corner. In this segment, Prof. Atrey discusses the impracticality of the ideal thermodynamic cycle for gas liquefaction and introduces the concept of modified cycles, which are proposed to address the limitations of the ideal cycle. His demeanor is professional, and he seems to be explaining complex concepts in a structured manner, likely aimed at students or professionals in the field of mechanical engineering.
